name: Deluxe Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add the shredded Cheddar cheese and stir until melted.
3. Add the sour cream, chopped green onions, and cubed potatoes to the saucepan; mix well.
4. Transfer the mixture into a buttered 2-quart baking dish.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
